title: Nami’s Scheme in Orange Town
description: On pages 1–4, this part raises the stakes in Orange Town as Buggy’s weapon and crew threaten the town directly.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: THE MAP OF THE GRAND LINE IS MINE AGAIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At the tavern, "The drinker pub"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AND WE HAVE A NEW CREWATE!! EVERYTHING IS GOING OUR WAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Everybody raise a glass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Live it up, men! Here's to our next conquest!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hooray!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: NAM!! ARE YOU KNOCKIN' EM BACK!?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Aye Aye, Cap'n Buggy!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Time for a drinking contest, New Girl!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I win!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HEH HEH... nobody can out- drink me! At this rate they'll all pass out soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THEN THEIR TREASURE WILL BE ALL MINE! PIRATES ARE SUCH EASY PREY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Chomp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Chomp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Looks like they're having fun.

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: THAT'S WHAT A PIRATE'S SUPPOSED TO DO!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Howya doin', "Boss?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let me outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AND GET ME SOME- THING TO EAT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm STARVING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mom Mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: YOU'RE NOT SO BAD. MAYBE I'LL LET YOU JOIN MY CREW AFTER ALL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Never!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't you realize what's going to happen to you?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They'll probably sell you off somewhere.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BUT HEY, IF MY PLAN WORKS...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Maybe I'll give you the key to this cage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: REALLY, YOU DON'T SEEM SO BAD... FOR A PIRATE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then let me out of here NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You picked the wrong partner, little thief!!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
